description: Shared ZFS contract fixture between fivenines-agent and fivenines-server. Source of truth: fivenines-agent tests/fixtures/zfs_contract_payload.json, asserted end-to-end by tests/test_zfs.py::test_contract_fixture_round_trip (only zfs._run and shutil.which are mocked with the canned zpool CLI output below). 'config' is the shape config['zfs'] takes (True, or {'interval': N}); 'payload' is the artifact the agent emits under data['zfs'] -- a list of per-pool health objects the server's ZFS ingester must parse. The collector is GENERIC (host-local zpool), not Proxmox-scoped: the server joins these pools to proxmox_storages where storage_type='zfs' on (host, pool name). Change the payload shape only in lockstep with the server spec and its fixture copy.

health_code_contract._note: Stable, append-only mapping of the zpool health string to payload.health_code. Never renumber. Unrecognized states -> null, with the raw 'health' string preserved so the backend can still react.

field_contract.health: raw zpool list health string, preserved verbatim.
field_contract.health_code: health mapped via health_code_contract; null if unrecognized.
field_contract.degraded_vdevs: count of devices/vdevs below the pool root whose state is DEGRADED/FAULTED/OFFLINE/REMOVED/UNAVAIL. null when zpool status was unavailable.
field_contract.resilver_progress: percent 0-100 of an in-progress resilver; 0.0 when not resilvering; null when zpool status was unavailable.
field_contract.scrub_errors: error count from the LAST COMPLETED scrub ('...with N errors'); null when the last scan was not a completed scrub (never scrubbed, resilver in progress, or status unavailable) -- distinguishes clean (0) from unknown (null). Distinct from 'errors' (current known data errors).
field_contract.fragmentation: pool fragmentation percent (mirror of summary.frag_percent, surfaced top-level for the backend join).
field_contract.summary: capacity block from 'zpool list -Hp': byte totals, frag/capacity percent, dedup_ratio (null when '-').
field_contract.errors: raw 'errors:' line from zpool status (current known data errors), NOT the scrub error count.
field_contract.vdev_tree: parsed device hierarchy (diagnostic); each node carries name/state/read/write/cksum and nested children; section devices in logs/spares/cache/special.
field_contract.zfs_version: first line of 'zpool version', repeated per pool.

scenario.rpool: healthy: ONLINE, last scrub completed with 0 errors, not resilvering -> health_code 0, degraded_vdevs 0, resilver_progress 0.0, scrub_errors 0.
scenario.tank: degraded: one mirror leg FAULTED, resilver in progress at 42.13% -> health_code 1, degraded_vdevs 2 (the DEGRADED mirror + the FAULTED leaf), resilver_progress 42.13, scrub_errors null (last scan is a resilver, not a scrub).
